Q7 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A WSS random process x(t) is applied to the input of an LTI system with impulse response, The mean value of the output y(t) of the system, if E[x(t)] = 10 is _______. (Roundedoff to three decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 62.832
Solution

62.832 (62.000 - 63.000)

‘C’ and ‘D’ both have zero mean and variance of ‘σ2’. The autocorrelation function of X(t) is,

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Q15 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

An information source is modelled as a bandlimited process with a bandwidth of 1000 Hz. This process is sampled at a rate higher than the Nyquist rate to provide a guard band of 500 Hz. The resulting samples takes one of the value in the set {a, b, c, d, e, f} with corresponding probabilities {0.05, 0.05, 0.1, 0.5, 0.25, 0.05}. The rate of information of the source is _________ kbps. (correct to two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 4.95
Solution

4.95 (4.50 - 5.50)

 
 
Q16 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A voice-grade AWGN (additive white Gaussian noise) telephone channel has a bandwidth of 5 kHz and two sided noise power spectral density  Watt/Hz. If information rate of 50 kbps is to be transmitted over this channel with arbitrarily small bit error rate, the minimum bit energy required is _________ (mJ/bit) (Rounded off to three decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 2.046
Solution

2.046 (1.990 - 2.150)
